ab: ray roSa’ siyan Sam’iyaeh o roSa’ tinal’oemaeh, to’oya’ ’a’iyalahoe: noka SaSinSinrahoe’ pinaSkira:a’ ka raro:o’ kayzaeh ka:aten nanaw ’anoka SaySiyat a raro:o’.
ch: 在2022年，政府召開了原住民身分證可單列族名的會議。
en: In 2022, the government announced that indigenous identification cards can include tribal names separately.

ab: yako somingozaw ’ima honaehnge: ila kamarima’ homa:ih ka to’oya’ ray pinaSkira:a’ ka raro:o’ “patnonak noka SaySiyat a raro:o’” Say hito’ ’al’alak hi taro’.
ch: 我訪問了長期向政府爭取身分證「單列族名」的部落青年taro’。
en: I interviewed taro’, a young tribal member who has long been advocating for the inclusion of tribal names on identification cards.

ab: yako ki siya hayza’ ka pinapoe’oe’ ray hini ’aehae’ kaSangayan ’am rima’ kansiya ray taew’an somingozaw hi siya.
ch: 我和他約定好這個假日到他家訪問他。
en: We had arranged to visit his home this holiday for the interview.

ab: ray ’am somingozaw, siya pakSekla’ ila ’iyakin nisiya raro:o’ ’inay’ino’, ma’ pakSekla’ lasiya ’aehae’ taew’an mae’iyaeh ki ’insiya’a hito’.
ch: 在訪問的過程中，他向我介紹了他的名字的由來，也帶我認識了他的家人、他的部落。
en: During the interview, he introduced to me the origin of his name and also introduced me to his family and tribe.

ab: yako somingozaw hi siya ’ampowa’ somapih ka raro:o’, ’ima tatini’ pinaSkira:a’ ’aewhay ay?
ch: 我問他為什麼堅持要改名，舊的登記方式不好嗎?
en: I asked him why he insisted on changing his name. Wasn’t the old registration method sufficient?

ab: siya tiSkobae:oeh ’iyakin komSa’, tani to’oya’ kina:at ’am ’okay Sekla’ i’ Sapang raro:o’ nisiya, ma’ hayza’ mae’iyaeh Somin hi siya “ta-Siyan-Sen” ’isa:a ma’ ’akoey ’ima pakaysawa’en ka howaw.
ch: 他對我說，因為用中文字並不能準確的傳達他的名字，其他人還會叫他「打先生」，也因此鬧出不少笑話。
en: He told me that using Chinese characters could not accurately convey his name, and others would still call him \"Da Xian Sheng,\" which resulted in many jokes being made.

ab: taro’ Sa, “tani noka SinSinrahoe’ kina:at ka raro:o’ Sapang ’inmita’a raro:o’. ma’an raro:o’ mina ’iwan niya’om Sinrahoe’, niya’om ’aehae’ taew’an, niya’om pinaSkira:a’ pakSiwa’ haeba:an SinSinrahoe’ nonak tomihoroe: ka ’in nonak a raro:o’.”
ch: taro’說：「原住民語書寫的名字才是我們真正的名字。我的名字代表了我們的族群、我們的家族、我們的身分，希望能有更多族人找回自己的名字。」
en: taro’ said, \"The names written in indigenous languages are our true names. My name represents our ethnic group, our family, our identity. I hope more fellow tribespeople can reclaim their own names.\"
